area_empty_body: Group routes into a sub-area, or drop a block to start logging routes right here.
area_empty_hint: Not sure? A block is the quickest way to add routes.
area_parentNotFound: The parent area no longer exists.
areas_createAreaError: Could not create the area. Please try again.
areas_nameExists: An area named "{name}" already exists here
areas_nameQuestion: What should we call this area?
auth_accountCreatedBody: Check your email to confirm, then sign in.
auth_brandHeadline: Your areas, topos and sessions. Kept private.
auth_brandSubtext: Pick up where your community left off. Your areas, topos and logbook stay visible only inside your region.
auth_forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth_passwordUpdatedBody: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.
auth_resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth_resetLinkSentBody: We sent a password reset link to {email}.
auth_resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth_signInSubtitle: Sign in to your areas, topos, and session logs.
auth_signUpFailed: Sign up failed, please try again
auth_signUpSubtitle: Join your community's private guidebook, or start your own region.
auth_termsAgree: By continuing you agree to grnyte's
blocks_add_confirmBody: Climbers won't see this block on the map, and you can't build a topo until it's placed. You can add a location anytime.
blocks_add_locationBody: So others can find it on the crag — and you can build a topo right here.
blocks_add_locationNote: You can add this later, but located blocks are far easier to find and share.
blocks_add_locationTitle: Pin this block on the map
blocks_add_nameHint: Leave blank to number it by position (e.g. Block 2).
blocks_nameExists: A block named "{name}" already exists here
blocks_order_hint: Drag into the order you pass them
error_generic_body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error_notfound_body: It may have been moved or deleted, or the link is out of date.
error_offline_body: We can't load this without a connection. Anything you've downloaded is still available.
error_server_body: This one's on us, not you. Give it a moment and try again.
error_server_title: Something went wrong on our end
form_noPermission: You don't have permission to do this.
landing_ctaBody: Already keeping notes in a spreadsheet? Message us and we'll help you move it over.
landing_ctaTitle: Your areas deserve better than a spreadsheet.
landing_exportBody: When an area's ready to go public, export your data to 8a.nu, The Topo or theCrag whenever you like. No lock-in, no obligation. Most areas just stay yours.
landing_exportTitle: Ready for the world? Export anytime.
landing_featureGuidebookBody: Organize areas, blocks, and problems with detailed topos, grades, and conditions. Built for bouldering.
landing_featureLogbookBody: Log your sessions and ascents, track projects and first ascents, and watch an area evolve over time.
landing_featureMapsBody: Every block and parking spot on a map, so you can actually find the way in. Even somewhere new.
landing_featureOfflineBody: Install it like an app and take your guidebook with you. No signal at the boulders? It still works.
landing_featurePrivateBody: Your areas never hit a public map or search. Only the people in your region can see them.
landing_featureRegionBody: Topos and conditions update instantly for everyone in your region. No email chains, no version conflicts.
landing_featuresTitle: Area management, topos and a logbook, without compromise.
landing_footerDesc: An open-source, private guidebook and logbook for bouldering. A hobby project for the community.
landing_heroCaption: Your blocks, your topos, your data
landing_heroSubtitle: Full area and topo management plus a complete logbook, built for bouldering. Visible only to the people in your region.
landing_heroTitle: Professional area and topo management. Kept private.
landing_heroTrust: Free · no commercial intent · made for climbers
landing_metaDescription: grnyte is an open-source guidebook and logbook for bouldering: full area and topo management plus session tracking, kept private and off the public map.
landing_nameDefinitionRest: with the vowels chipped off. A home for the lines that aren't on any public map.
landing_peekTitle: Built for your phone, right there at the boulders.
landing_personaCommunitiesBody: Climbing groups whose spots are better kept off the public map.
landing_personaDevelopersBody: First ascensionists managing projects they're not ready to make public.
landing_personaRegionsBody: Anyone starting their own region. Set it up in minutes and invite exactly who you want.
landing_shotLogbookCaption: Your sessions and sends over time.
landing_shotMapCaption: Every block and the parking, on one map.
landing_shotTopoCaption: Lines drawn right on the boulder.
landing_whyBody1: Most guidebooks and logbooks are public by default. That doesn't always work. Fragile spots, projects still in progress, or areas that have to stay private to keep access open.
landing_whyBody2: Areas, topos and session logs live inside your own region, structured like a real guidebook. A full audit log tracks who changed what, and everything stays visible only to the people you invite. Start a region for free, or join an existing one by invitation.
landing_whyTitle: Some areas aren't meant for the public map. They still deserve a proper guidebook.
legal_cookies_metaDescription: Cookie Policy for {name} - Learn about the cookies we use and how to manage your preferences.
legal_disclaimer_metaDescription: Important disclaimers and safety information for {name} users.
legal_privacy_metaDescription: Privacy Policy for {name} - How we collect, use, and protect your climbing data.
legal_terms_metaDescription: Terms of Service for {name} - Rules and guidelines for using our climbing tracker application.
parking_coordinatesHint: Decimal degrees. Paste a “lat, lng” pair straight from any maps app.
parking_mapHint: Move the map to position the pin
parking_pathHint: Optional — trace the trail from the parking, or just save.
parking_previewEmpty: Enter valid coordinates to preview the spot
queryState_error: Something went wrong while loading this data.
topo_none: No topo for this block yet.
